translations.en: I don't have any energy today.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi không có năng lượng.
translations.hi: आज मेरे पास ऊर्जा नहीं है।
translations.nb: Jeg har ikke energi i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini saya tidak punya energi.
translations.da: Jeg har ingen energi i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は元気がありません。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; serves as the clausal subject and agrees with the finite verb.
Finite verb avoir in present indicative, 1st person singular (ai), preceded by clitic negation ne (n'). Forms part of the discontinuous negation ne … plus.
Negative polarity adverb completing the negation (ne … plus), indicating cessation; placed postverbally.
Prepositional noun phrase headed by énergie (mass noun) introduced by de; functions as the object/complement of avoir (partitive de under negation).
Temporal adverb modifying the clause, locating the situation in the present day.

sentences.target: Tu as trop d'énergie ce matin.

translations.fr: Tu as trop d'énergie ce matin.
translations.en: You have too much energy this morning.
translations.de: Du hast heute Morgen zu viel Energie.
translations.zh-Hans: 你今天早上精力太旺盛了。
translations.ru: У тебя сегодня утром слишком много энергии.
translations.pt: Você tem energia demais esta manhã.
translations.he: יש לך יותר מדי אנרגיה הבוקר.
translations.tr: Bu sabah çok fazla enerjin var.
translations.vi: Sáng nay bạn có quá nhiều năng lượng.
translations.nl: Je hebt vanmorgen te veel energie.
translations.uk: У тебе сьогодні вранці забагато енергії.
translations.hu: Ma reggel túl sok energiád van.
translations.hi: आज सुबह तुम्हारे पास बहुत ज़्यादा ऊर्जा है।
translations.pl: Masz dziś rano za dużo energii.
translations.el: Έχεις υπερβολική ενέργεια σήμερα το πρωί.
translations.nb: Du har altfor mye energi i dag tidlig.
translations.id: Pagi ini kamu punya terlalu banyak energi.
translations.sv: Du har alldeles för mycket energi i dag på morgonen.
translations.ro: În dimineața asta ai prea multă energie.
translations.cs: Dnes ráno máš příliš mnoho energie.
translations.da: Du har alt for meget energi her til morgen.
translations.fi: Sinulla on tänä aamuna liikaa energiaa.
translations.ja: 今朝は元気がありすぎます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; controls agreement of the finite verb.
Finite verb avoir in present indicative, 2nd person singular; takes a quantified noun phrase as complement.
Degree adverb functioning as a quantifier; combines with de + NOUN to express excess (trop de + N).
Prepositional noun phrase with de introducing the mass noun énergie; complement of avoir, specified by the quantifier trop.
Demonstrative determiner modifying the temporal noun matin.
Temporal noun; with determiner ce forms an adverbial NP (ce matin) functioning as a time adjunct.

sentences.target: On manque d'énergie en ce moment.

translations.fr: On manque d'énergie en ce moment.
translations.en: We're low on energy right now.
translations.it: In questo momento siamo a corto di energie.
translations.ru: Сейчас у нас не хватает энергии.
translations.pt: Neste momento estamos com pouca energia.
translations.vi: Bây giờ chúng ta đang thiếu năng lượng.
translations.ar: نحن نفتقر إلى الطاقة في الوقت الحالي.
translations.nl: We hebben op dit moment weinig energie.
translations.uk: Зараз у нас не вистачає енергії.
translations.hi: अभी हमारे पास ऊर्जा कम है।
translations.pl: W tej chwili brakuje nam energii.
translations.el: Αυτή τη στιγμή μας λείπει ενέργεια.
translations.nb: Akkurat nå har vi lite energi.
translations.sv: Just nu har vi lite energi.
translations.ro: În acest moment avem puțină energie.
translations.fi: Juuri nyt meillä on vähän energiaa.
translations.ja: 私たちは今、元気がありません。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/collective subject pronoun (often ‘we’), grammatically 3rd person singular; subject of the verb.
Finite verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes a complement with de to express lacking something.
Prepositional noun phrase headed by énergie, introduced by de; complements the verb manquer (manquer de + N).
Preposition introducing a temporal PP that functions as an adverbial modifier.
Demonstrative determiner modifying moment within the PP.
Head noun of the PP en ce moment; the whole expression is a fixed temporal adverbial meaning ‘right now’.

translations.it: Grazie per la tua energia oggi.
translations.vi: Cảm ơn vì năng lượng của bạn hôm nay.
translations.hi: आज तुम्हारी ऊर्जा के लिए धन्यवाद।
translations.el: Ευχαριστώ για την ενέργειά σου σήμερα.
translations.nb: Takk for energien din i dag.
translations.id: Terima kasih atas energimu hari ini.
translations.da: Tak for din energi i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は元気をくれてありがとう。

tokens.explanation: Interjection used to express gratitude; stands as an independent clause.
Preposition introducing a complement specifying the reason/object of gratitude.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular; agrees in gender/number with énergie and modifies the noun.
Common noun; object of the preposition pour, headed by possessive determiner ton.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause, indicating when the gratitude applies.

We're low on energy right now.
